name: branch-naming
description: Always-on branch naming convention for AI coding agents: name every new branch <type>/<optional-tracking-id>-<short-kebab-description>, using the same type vocabulary as Conventional Commits, lowercase kebab-case, and a single slash.

source.title: Branch Naming Convention
source.relationship: Authored as a portable baseline pack to sit alongside commit-conventions and git-collaboration-hygiene, sharing the Conventional Commits type vocabulary so branch names and commit subjects rhyme. Kept generic so it applies to work and personal repositories.
